rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation in the introduction as a general example of work on word-of-mouth influence and its managerial importance. The citing paper does not discuss Libai et al. (2013) separately, and it is not used to build hypotheses, define constructs, motivate mechanisms, or justify methods in the consensus-language studies. This indicates a background literature-list role rather than a meaningful directional dependence.
